subject: [PATCH v3 20/28] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch adds a new helper function `nfsd4_encode_attr_vals` to the NFSv4 server code, which encodes attribute values into an XDR stream. The function takes in an XDR stream, an attribute mask, and a structure containing arguments for encoding attributes. It breaks out the encoding of attribute values from the main encoding loop, making the code more modular and easier to maintain.
